name: Social: Match Voice

description.en: Rewrite a post to match the author's personal voice and style as defined in the agent's character.
description.es: Rewrite a post to match the author's personal voice and style as defined in the agent's character.
description.fr: Rewrite a post to match the author's personal voice and style as defined in the agent's character.
description.ro: Rewrite a post to match the author's personal voice and style as defined in the agent's character.
description.it: Rewrite a post to match the author's personal voice and style as defined in the agent's character.

bot: Use this when the user wants to make a post sound more like them. Rely on the agent's character description for voice and style cues. Do not invent a style — only apply what is defined.

description.en: The post you want to rewrite in your voice

description.fr: The post you want to rewrite in your voice
description.ro: The post you want to rewrite in your voice
description.it: The post you want to rewrite in your voice
